text.title: Stakeholder Engagement Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked examples illustrating rule application and artefact shape.

example.title: Register-curator JSON patch
example.note: { action:add, id:S-07, name:VP Engineering, category:Sponsor, power:H, interest:H, attitude:supportive, quadrant:Manage Closely, evidence:['email 2026-05-12: I will champion Q3 launch'], cadence:weekly, channel:1:1, owner:PM, rationale:'sponsor for Q2 platform initiative' }. Validator passes; CODEOWNERS gate requires PM merge.
